- 修复切换 `.nomedia` 过滤后隐藏视频残留在列表里，且上一集和下一集失效的问题
- 提升 MKV 视频从历史进度恢复时的加载速度，并尽量保留更准确的续播位置
- 修复模拟器播放 ASS 字幕时的崩溃问题
- 将默认主题调整为天蓝色，并精简深色主题选项
- 将设置入口移动到本地媒体和云端媒体的顶部栏，进入设置更直接

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fix hidden videos remaining in the list and broken previous or next navigation after toggling `.nomedia` filtering
- Speed up MKV resume loading while keeping playback resume positions as accurate as possible
- Fix ASS subtitle playback crashes on emulators
- Set the default theme to sky blue and simplify dark theme options
- Move the settings entry to the top bars of local and cloud media pages for quicker access

</details>
